stage_title: 同步互斥与进程间通信

answers.stem: 该内核提供了哪些同步原语？（SpinLock/Mutex/RwLock/Semaphore/Condvar/WaitQueue 等；列出类型定义证据）
answers.value: SpinLock (kernel/include/spinlock.h), Semaphore (kernel/include/sem.h), SleepLock/Mutex (kernel/include/sleeplock.h). WaitQueue functionality is provided via sleep/wakeup channels in kernel/proc.c.

evidence.excerpt: struct spinlock { uint locked; char *name; struct cpu *cpu; };
struct semaphore { int value; int valid; struct spinlock lock; };
struct sleeplock { uint locked; struct spinlock lk; char *name; int pid; };
void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { ... }

answers.stem: Mutex 更接近哪种实现？
answers.value: B. 阻塞锁（Blocking Mutex，进入等待队列并挂起）

evidence.excerpt: void acquiresleep(struct sleeplock *lk) { acquire(&lk->lk); while (lk->locked) { sleep(lk, &lk->lk); } ... }

answers.stem: 是否存在等待队列 (Wait Queue, WaitQueue) 与 sleep/wakeup（或等价阻塞/唤醒）实现？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { ... p->state = SLEEPING; sched(); ... }
void wakeup(void *chan) { ... if (p->state == SLEEPING && p->chan == chan) { p->state = RUNNABLE; } ... }

answers.stem:
sleep / wakeup 不变量 (Sleep-Wakeup Invariant) 分析，按格式填写：
- sleep 入口函数: ___（路径）
- 入睡前持有的锁: ___（无则写 none）
- 防丢 wakeup (Lost Wakeup Prevention) 机制: ___（如：持队列锁检查条件 / 无防护）
- wakeup 函数: ___（路径）
- 唤醒与锁释放顺序: ___（先唤醒后释放 / 先释放后唤醒 / 其他）
answers.value:
sleep 入口函数：kernel/proc.c::sleep
入睡前持有的锁：lk (function argument)
防丢 wakeup (Lost Wakeup Prevention) 机制：sleep 内部获取 p->lock (proc lock) 后再释放 lk 并睡眠；wakeup 也获取 p->lock 后检查条件
wakeup 函数：kernel/proc.c::wakeup
唤醒与锁释放顺序：先唤醒后释放 (wakeup 中释放 p->lock 前设置状态；在 sleeplock.c releasesleep 中调用 wakeup 后释放 lk->lk)

evidence.excerpt: void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { ... if (lk != &p->lock) { acquire(&p->lock); release(lk); } p->chan = chan; p->state = SLEEPING; sched(); ... }
void wakeup(void *chan) { ... acquire(&p->lock); if (p->state == SLEEPING && p->chan == chan) { p->state = RUNNABLE; } release(&p->lock); ... }
void releasesleep(struct sleeplock *lk) { acquire(&lk->lk); lk->locked = 0; wakeup(lk); release(&lk->lk); }

answers.stem: 是否实现管道 (Pipe)？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: int pipealloc(struct file **f0, struct file **f1) { ... } int pipewrite(...) { ... } int piperead(...) { ... }

answers.stem: pipe 缓冲形态更接近哪种？
answers.value: A. 字节环形缓冲区 (ring buffer)

evidence.excerpt: struct pipe { ... char data[PIPESIZE]; uint nread; uint nwrite; ... };
pi->data[pi->nwrite++ % PIPESIZE] = ch;

answers.stem: pipe 的阻塞语义更接近哪种？
answers.value: A. 阻塞：挂起当前线程/任务进入等待队列

evidence.excerpt: while (pi->nwrite == pi->nread + PIPESIZE) { ... sleep(&pi->nwrite, &pi->lock); }
while (pi->nread == pi->nwrite && pi->writeopen) { ... sleep(&pi->nread, &pi->lock); }

answers.stem: 是否实现消息队列/信号量/共享内存等 SysV IPC (Message Queue / Semaphore / Shared Memory, msg/sem/shm)？（必须三态；若仅实现其一需说明）

evidence.excerpt: struct semaphore { ... }; void sem_init(...); void sem_wait(...); void sem_post(...);
Implementation of POSIX-like semaphores (sem_init, sem_wait, sem_post), not SysV IPC (semget, semop).
No SysV IPC system calls (msgget, shmget, semget) found in syscall table.

answers.stem: 是否实现 futex？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: void futexWait(...); void futexWake(...); void futexRequeue(...);
uint64 sys_futex(void) { ... }

answers.stem: 是否实现信号机制（sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline）？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: int set_sigaction(...); void sighandle(void); uint64 rt_sigreturn(void);
uint64 sys_rt_sigaction(void); uint64 sys_rt_sigreturn(void); uint64 sys_kill(void);
signalTrampoline: li a7, 139; ecall

answers.stem: 若实现 signal handler：用户态 handler 上下文如何构建？是否存在 sigreturn 恢复原 trap frame？（必须给证据）
answers.value: Context saved in p->sig_tf (kernel/signal.c::sighandle). Handler entry set in trapframe->epc. Return address set to signalTrampoline. sigreturn (rt_sigreturn) restores trapframe from p->sig_tf.

evidence.excerpt: p->sig_tf = kalloc(); memcpy(p->sig_tf, p->trapframe, sizeof(struct trapframe)); p->trapframe->epc = (uint64)p->sigaction[signum].__sigaction_handler.sa_handler; p->trapframe->ra = (uint64)SIGTRAMPOLINE;
uint64 rt_sigreturn(void) { ... memcpy(p->trapframe, p->sig_tf, sizeof(struct trapframe)); kfree(p->sig_tf); ... }
signalTrampoline: li a7, 139; ecall

answers.stem: RwLock（读写锁 Reader-Writer Lock）的实现形态更接近哪种？

evidence.excerpt: No rwlock.h or rwlock implementation found in kernel/include or kernel source.

answers.stem: 底层原子操作来源更接近哪种？

evidence.excerpt: while (__sync_lock_test_and_set(&lk->locked, 1) != 0) ;
Uses GCC built-in __sync functions, not Rust or explicit custom assembly in source.

answers.stem:
死锁四必要条件（Coffman Conditions）在该内核中是否均成立？
请逐条作答（互斥 Mutual Exclusion / 持有并等待 Hold-and-Wait / 不可剥夺 No Preemption / 循环等待 Circular Wait），并结合 SpinLock/Mutex 的实现给出证据或写「不适用」。
answers.value: 互斥：成立 (SpinLock/SleepLock 保证互斥)。持有并等待：成立 (acquiresleep 持有 lk->lk 时调用 sleep)。不可剥夺：成立 (锁不能强制释放)。循环等待：成立 (无全局锁序强制，可能产生)。

evidence.excerpt: while (__sync_lock_test_and_set(&lk->locked, 1) != 0) ;
acquire(&lk->lk); while (lk->locked) { sleep(lk, &lk->lk); }
Releases lk but holds p->lock while transitioning to SLEEPING.

answers.stem: 内核对死锁 (Deadlock) 的处理策略更接近哪种？
answers.value: D. 忽略 (Ostrich Algorithm)：不处理，依赖外部重启

evidence.excerpt: Mentions finding a deadlock bug and fixing it manually. No general deadlock detection or avoidance mechanism found in code.
No deadlock detection or avoidance code (e.g. Banker's algorithm) found.

answers.stem: 是否存在全局锁顺序（Lock Ordering）规范或注释，以预防嵌套锁导致的循环等待死锁 (Circular Wait Deadlock)？（必须三态；若 implemented 需给出锁排序规则或 ABBA 锁检测代码证据）

evidence.excerpt: No explicit global lock ordering documentation or enforcement code found in the provided source.

answers.stem: 是否实现管程/条件变量 (Monitor / Condition Variable, Stallings Ch5)？（必须三态；搜索 Condvar / condition_variable / monitor / wait/notify/signal 等；若 implemented 需区分 Hoare 语义（等待者立即恢复）vs Mesa 语义（等待者重新竞争锁））

evidence.excerpt: void wakeup(void *chan) { ... for (p = proc; p < &proc[NPROC]; p++) { ... if (p->state == SLEEPING && p->chan == chan) { p->state = RUNNABLE; } ... } }
wakeup(lk); release(&lk->lk); // Wakeup called before releasing lock, but waiters must reacquire lock in acquiresleep (Mesa semantics).

answers.stem:
经典同步问题验证 (Classic Synchronization Problems, Stallings Ch5)：
以下三个经典问题在该内核中是否有对应实现或测试？
- 生产者-消费者 (Producer-Consumer / Bounded Buffer)：___（implemented/not_found + 证据）
- 读者-写者 (Readers-Writers)：___（实现了读者优先/写者优先/公平？ + 证据）
- 哲学家就餐 (Dining Philosophers)：___（implemented/not_found）
answers.value: 生产者 - 消费者：implemented (Pipe 实现，kernel/pipe.c)。读者 - 写者：not_found (无 RwLock)。哲学家就餐：not_found。

evidence.excerpt: Pipe implements bounded buffer with sleep/wakeup on full/empty conditions.
No Readers-Writers lock implementation found.
No Dining Philosophers implementation or test found.

answers.stem: 是否实现消息传递 (Message Passing, Stallings Ch5) 作为 IPC 机制？（必须三态；区分直接消息传递 Direct / 间接通过邮箱 Mailbox / POSIX mq_open 等；与 SysV msgq 的区别是是否通过内核邮箱路由）

evidence.excerpt: No SysV message queue or explicit message passing IPC (send/receive primitives) found. Pipe is byte-stream.

answers.stem: 是否实现屏障同步 (Barrier Synchronization, Stallings Ch5)？（必须三态；搜索 barrier / sync_barrier / pthread_barrier 或等价；用于多线程/多核同步到同一检查点）

evidence.excerpt: No barrier synchronization implementation found in the source code.
